task_name: Turn phone on and put it on the table
instruction: I’ve finished dinner and feel like scrolling on my phone for a bit—please pick it up from the dining table, turn it on, and set it on the coffee table so I can relax with a full stomach
target_description: I’ve finished dinner and feel like scrolling on my phone for a bit—please pick it up from the dining table, turn it on, and set it on the coffee table so I can relax with a full stomach
